name: Brussel Sprouts with Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Yellow Onion, Peeled, Sliced Thin
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the stems and remove any limp leaves from the Brussels sprouts.
2. Blanch the sprouts in boiling water for 5 minutes, then drain and rinse under cold water to stop the cooking process.
3. Heat a large frying pan and add the olive oil, garlic, and onion. Sauté until the onion becomes tender.
4. Add the blanched, drained Brussels sprouts to the pan and sauté until they are cooked to your liking.
5. Add the balsamic vinegar and toss so that all the sprouts are coated with the vinegar.
6. Add the butter and season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Toss together again.
